title: pelargonium × volatiflorum
intro: Pelargonium × volatiflorum, also known as Red Gold or Rose-scented Geranium, is a hybrid plant species within the geranium family, characterized by its distinctive rose-like fragrance and vibrant red flowers. The plant has been utilized in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties, which make it an effective treatment for various health issues. The health benefits of Pelargonium × volatiflorum include its ability to alleviate symptoms of anxiety and stress, as well as its potential to help manage menstrual cramps and other digestive issues. Herbal preparations of the plant can be found in various forms, including teas, essential oils, and tinctures, which are often used to promote relaxation and well-being.
